sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79943" key="passalokopi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πασσᾰλοκοπ-ία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n79943.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">making a palisade</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1165.tlg001:143:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Apollod.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Poliorc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">143.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
